multinational enterprise. 4:["$","br","12",{"className":"block h-4"}]
5:["$","li","13",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Cross-border transactions** occur between related entities"}]
6:["$","li","14",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Services are shared** between international branches"}]
7:["$","li","15",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Intellectual property** is used across borders"}]
8:["$","li","16",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Financing arrangements** exist between related companies"}]
9:["$","br","17",{"className":"block h-4"}]
a:["$","h2","18",{"className":"text-3xl font-bold text-foreground mt-8 mb-4","children":"Basic Transfer Pricing Policies"}]

f:["$","li","23",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Master File**: Overview of the multinational group"}]
10:["$","li","24",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Local File**: Detailed documentation for local entity"}]
11:["$","li","25",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Country-by-Country Report**: For large multinationals (may not apply to SMEs)"}]
12:["$","li","26",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Contemporaneous Documentation**: Prepared before or during transactions"}]
13:["$","br","27",{"className":"block h-4"}]
14:["$","h3","28",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Core Policy Elements"}]

19:["$","li","33",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Controlled Transactions**: Details of intercompany dealings"}]
1a:["$","li","34",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Transfer Pricing Method**: Methodology for setting prices"}]
1b:["$","li","35",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Comparability Analysis**: Benchmarking against independent parties"}]
1c:["$","br","36",{"className":"block h-4"}]
1d:["$","h2","37",{"className":"text-3xl font-bold text-foreground mt-8 mb-4","children":"Transfer Pricing Methods"}]
1e:["$","br","38",{"className":"block h-4"}]
1f:["$","h3","39",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Traditional Methods"}]
20:["$","br","40",{"className":"block h-4"}]
21:["$","h4","41",{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-foreground mt-4 mb-2","children":"Comparable Uncontrolled Price (CUP)"}]
22:["$","p","42",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Direct comparison with prices charged in comparable uncontrolled transactions between independent parties."}]
23:["$","br","43",{"className":"block h-4"}]
24:["$","p","44",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Best for:"}]
25:["$","li","45",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"Standardized products"}]
26:["$","li","46",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"Active markets"}]
27:["$","li","47",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"Comparable transactions available"}]
28:["$","br","48",{"className":"block h-4"}]
29:["$","h4","49",{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-foreground mt-4 mb-2","children":"Cost Plus Method"}]
2a:["$","p","50",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Cost of production plus appropriate markup."}]
2b:["$","br","51",{"className":"block h-4"}]
2c:["$","p","52",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Best for:"}]
2d:["$","li","53",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"Semi-finished goods"}]
2e:["$","li","54",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"Services between related entities"}]
2f:["$","li","55",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"Long-term contracts"}]
30:["$","br","56",{"className":"block h-4"}]
31:["$","h4","57",{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-foreground mt-4 mb-2","children":"Resale Price Method"}]
32:["$","p","58",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Resale price to unrelated parties minus appropriate gross margin."}]
33:["$","br","59",{"className":"block h-4"}]
34:["$","p","60",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Best for:"}]
35:["$","li","61",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"Distribution operations"}]
36:["$","li","62",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"Limited functionality distributors"}]
37:["$","li","63",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"Marketing and selling activities"}]
38:["$","br","64",{"className":"block h-4"}]
39:["$","h3","65",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Transactional Methods"}]
3a:["$","br","66",{"className":"block h-4"}]
3b:["$","h4","67",{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-foreground mt-4 mb-2","children":"Transactional Net Margin Method (TNMM)"}]
3c:["$","p","68",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Net profit margin relative to base (sales, costs, or assets) compared to independent parties."}]
3d:["$","br","69",{"className":"block h-4"}]
3e:["$","p","70",{"className":"font-semibold text-foreground mt-4","children":"Best for:"}]

44:["$","p","76",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Splitting profits from controlled transactions based on relative contributions."}]
45:["$","br","77",{"className":"block h-4"}]

51:["$","li","89",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**De Minimis Exemptions**: Thresholds below which full documentation isn't required"}]
52:["$","li","90",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Simplified Methods**: Less complex methodologies for basic transactions"}]
53:["$","br","91",{"className":"block h-4"}]

57:["$","p","95",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Charging for management, technical, or administrative services:"}]
58:["$","br","96",{"className":"block h-4"}]
59:["$","li","97",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Cost Allocation**: Based on actual costs incurred"}]
5a:["$","li","98",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Market Rates**: Benchmark against independent service providers"}]
5b:["$","li","99",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Value-Added**: Consider expertise and efficiency benefits"}]
5c:["$","br","100",{"className":"block h-4"}]
5d:["$","h4","101",{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-foreground mt-4 mb-2","children":"Interest on Loans"}]
5e:["$","p","102",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Intercompany financing arrangements:"}]
5f:["$","br","103",{"className":"block h-4"}]
60:["$","li","104",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Arm's Length Rates**: Based on market interest rates"}]
61:["$","li","105",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Credit Risk**: Consider borrower's creditworthiness"}]
62:["$","li","106",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Currency Risk**: Adjust for currency differences"}]
63:["$","br","107",{"className":"block h-4"}]
64:["$","h4","108",{"className":"text-xl font-bold text-foreground mt-4 mb-2","children":"Royalty Payments"}]
65:["$","p","109",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Payments for intellectual property use:"}]
66:["$","br","110",{"className":"block h-4"}]
67:["$","li","111",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Comparable Licenses**: Similar agreements with unrelated parties"}]
68:["$","li","112",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Profit Split**: Based on contribution to profits"}]
69:["$","li","113",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Cost Recovery**: R&D and development costs"}]
6a:["$","br","114",{"className":"block h-4"}]
6b:["$","h2","115",{"className":"text-3xl font-bold text-foreground mt-8 mb-4","children":"Implementation Steps"}]
6c:["$","br","116",{"className":"block h-4"}]

6e:["$","p","118",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Determine entities under common control:"}]
6f:["$","br","119",{"className":"block h-4"}]
70:["$","li","120",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Direct Control**: >50% ownership"}]
71:["$","li","121",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Indirect Control**: Through subsidiaries"}]
72:["$","li","122",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**De Facto Control**: Through agreements or arrangements"}]
73:["$","br","123",{"className":"block h-4"}]
74:["$","h3","124",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Step 2: Map Controlled Transactions"}]

76:["$","br","126",{"className":"block h-4"}]
77:["$","li","127",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Goods**: Tangible products and inventory"}]
78:["$","li","128",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Services**: Management, technical, administrative"}]
79:["$","li","129",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Intangibles**: Intellectual property, patents, trademarks"}]
7a:["$","li","130",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Financial**: Loans, guarantees, cash pooling"}]
7b:["$","br","131",{"className":"block h-4"}]
7c:["$","h3","132",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Step 3: Select Transfer Pricing Methods"}]
7d:["$","p","133",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-4","children":"Choose appropriate methods for each transaction type:"}]
7e:["$","br","134",{"className":"block h-4"}]
7f:["$","li","135",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Primary Method**: Most suitable for specific transaction"}]
80:["$","li","136",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Secondary Method**: Backup if primary not applicable"}]
81:["$","li","137",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Documentation**: Justify method selection"}]
82:["$","br","138",{"className":"block h-4"}]
83:["$","h3","139",{"className":"text-2xl font-bold text-foreground mt-6 mb-3","children":"Step 4: Prepare Documentation"}]

85:["$","br","141",{"className":"block h-4"}]
86:["$","li","142",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Functional Analysis**: Roles, assets, and risks of each party"}]
87:["$","li","143",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Economic Analysis**: Market conditions and comparables"}]
88:["$","li","144",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Methodology Application**: Detailed calculation process"}]
89:["$","li","145",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Contemporaneous Records**: Prepared during tax year"}]
8a:["$","br","146",{"className":"block h-4"}]

8f:["$","br","151",{"className":"block h-4"}]
90:["$","li","152",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Inconsistent Margins**: Unusual profit variations"}]
91:["$","li","153",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Loss-Making Entities**: Persistent losses in profitable markets"}]
92:["$","li","154",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Intensive Transactions**: High volume of intercompany dealings"}]
93:["$","li","155",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Tax Haven Operations**: Entities in low-tax jurisdictions"}]
94:["$","br","156",{"className":"block h-4"}]

97:["$","br","159",{"className":"block h-4"}]

99:["$","li","161",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Documentation Reviews**: Regular assessment of documentation quality"}]
9a:["$","li","162",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Benchmark Studies**: Updated comparability analysis"}]
9b:["$","li","163",{"className":"text-muted-foreground mt-1","children":"**Professional Advice**: Expert guidance on complex issues"}]
9c:["$","br","164",{"className":"block h-4"}]
9d:["$","h2","165",{"className":"text-3xl font-bold text-foreground mt-8 mb-4","children":"Practical Tips for SMEs"}]
